title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: AWS Developers tutorial on Infrastructure as Code fundamentals using AWS CDK with Python. The video contrasts manual console configuration of a serverless REST API with DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway against automated deployment via CDK, demonstrating IaC benefits and comparing CDK with CloudFormation and Terraform.
